items.text: Nvidia earnings alone won’t rescue the S&P 500 from its new sell signal
items.summary: Overbought warnings come ahead of a massive tech and retail earnings lineup.
items.text_it: I guadagni di Nvidia da soli non salveranno l'S&P 500 dal suo nuovo segnale di vendita

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: All-you-can-eat deals are back at restaurants like Red Lobster and Applebee’s. Here’s how to get your money’s worth.
items.summary: As inflation has tightened household budgets, several chain restaurants have brought back all-you-can-eat deals to drive foot traffic.
items.text_it: Le offerte all-you-can-eat sono tornate in ristoranti come Red Lobster e Applebee's. Ecco come ottenere il valore dei tuoi soldi.
items.summary_it: Poiché l'inflazione ha ristretto i bilanci delle famiglie, diversi ristoranti della catena hanno riportato offerte all-you-can-eat per guidare il traffico pedonale.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Trump’s big trip was supposed to sell 500 Boeing planes. China is only buying 200 of them.
items.summary: Boeing’s stock on Thursday headed for its steepest fall in six months after President Donald Trump said China is buying 200 of the company’s jets, disappointing investors who had expected more than double that number.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Trump’s big trip was supposed to sell 500 Boeing planes. China is only buying 200 of them.
items.summary: Boeing’s stock on Thursday headed for its steepest fall in six months after President Donald Trump said China is buying 200 of the company’s jets, disappointing investors who had expected more than double that number.
items.text_it: Il grande viaggio di Trump avrebbe dovuto vendere 500 aerei Boeing. La Cina ne sta acquistando solo 200.
items.summary_it: Giovedì le azioni di Boeing si sono dirette verso il suo calo più ripido in sei mesi dopo che il presidente Donald Trump ha dichiarato che la Cina sta acquistando 200 jet della società, deludendo gli investitori che si aspettavano più del doppio di quel numero.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Trump discloses big buys of shares in Boeing and Nvidia as the companies look set to gain from his China trip
items.summary: President Donald Trump has filed a disclosure showing massive buying and selling of U.S. stocks, index funds and other securities, including purchasing at least $1 million in shares of Boeing and Nvidia as those companies expect to score new business during his trip to China.
items.text_it: Trump rivela grandi acquisti di azioni di Boeing e Nvidia mentre le aziende sembrano destinate a guadagnare dal suo viaggio in Cina
items.summary_it: Il presidente Donald Trump ha presentato una divulgazione che mostra massicci acquisti e vendite di azioni, fondi indicizzati e altri titoli statunitensi, incluso l'acquisto di almeno 1 milione di $ in azioni di Boeing e Nvidia, poiché tali società si aspettano di ottenere nuovi affari durante il suo viaggio in Cina.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: ‘I have zero envy’: I’m 75, enjoy working and live below my means. Why are more people not like me?
items.summary: “I did two basic things right: I married the right person and chose a trade I can practice until I die.”

items.summary: Iranian strikes and a blockade have paralyzed Qatar’s gas engine, creating a technical bottleneck likely to stall exports for years.

items.text: The commodities guru who warned about silver falling now, is saying the hantavirus could do the same to oil
items.summary: What if the Hantavirus turns into a black-swan for oil? This former hedge-fund executive is taking out some insurance against that.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Inflation will likely be higher for longer. Your retirement plan isn’t built for that.
items.summary: Official CPI masks double-digit spikes in healthcare, insurance and energy. Meanwhile, an outdated strategy quietly drains your portfolio.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: U.S. retail sales rise again, but higher gas prices and inflation play a big role
items.summary: Sales at retailers rose in April for the third month in a row, but the increase stemmed in large part from drivers spending more on gasoline because of higher prices. Spending was on the softer side after adjusting for inflation.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: In Qatar, Energy Sector Damage Is Severe, and the Way Back Will Be Long
items.summary: Iranian strikes and a blockade have paralyzed Qatar’s gas engine, creating a technical bottleneck likely to stall exports for years.
items.text_it: In Qatar, i danni del settore energetico sono gravi e la via del ritorno sarà lunga
items.summary_it: Gli scioperi iraniani e un blocco hanno paralizzato il motore a gas del Qatar, creando un collo di bottiglia tecnico che rischia di bloccare le esportazioni per anni.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: U.S. retail sales rise again, but higher gas prices and inflation play a big role
items.summary: Sales at retailers rose in April for the third month in a row, but the increase stemmed in large part from drivers spending more on gasoline because of higher prices. Spending was on the softer side after adjusting for inflation.
items.text_it: Le vendite al dettaglio negli Stati Uniti aumentano di nuovo, ma l'aumento dei prezzi del gas e l'inflazione svolgono un ruolo importante
items.summary_it: Le vendite presso i rivenditori sono aumentate ad aprile per il terzo mese consecutivo, ma l'aumento è dovuto in gran parte ai conducenti che spendono di più per la benzina a causa dei prezzi più alti. La spesa è stata più morbida dopo l'aggiustamento per l'inflazione.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Cisco to cut jobs so it can invest more in AI, and the stock rockets toward a record
items.summary: Cisco’s stock soars into record territory, after the networking giant announced plans to invest more in AI and upbeat earnings report.
